## Problem or motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include command names, UX, or API changes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Any prior art, references, or mockups.
